name: Diligence Fitness Rewards
description: Self-hosted fitness rewards platform with points-based behavioral economy. Your fitness data stays on your hardware. AI agents can log activities, query progress, manage meal plans, and configure device integrations via MCP.

skills.name: Context & Status
skills.description: Get full user profile with motivation type (BREQ-2), active program, points status, rewards, and integration connections. Includes get_context (full brief), get_today (daily points/gate), and get_week (weekly summary).

skills.name: Activity Logging
skills.description: Record workouts, runs, walks, cycling, yoga, or any physical activity. Awards points based on activity type and duration. Supports structured program workouts via program_day parameter.
examples: Log my StrongLifts Workout B today
I did 45 minutes of yoga this morning

skills.name: Food & Nutrition
skills.description: Log food intake with calorie and macro tracking. Search Open Food Facts (4M+ products) and USDA FoodData Central (400K+ research-grade items). Awards points for consistent food logging.
examples: I had 2 eggs and toast for breakfast
Log a salad for lunch, about 400 calories

skills.name: Program Schedule
skills.description: View today's scheduled workout from the active program including exercises, sets, reps, and weight progression. Shows upcoming workouts and overall program completion percentage.
examples: Show me this week's program schedule
How far through my program am I?

skills.name: Rewards
skills.description: View available rewards with point costs and spend earned points. Rewards are user-configurable (gaming time, screen time, treats, etc.). Points gate must be passed before redemption.
examples: Spend points on 30 minutes of gaming
Do I have enough points for a movie?

skills.name: Meal Planning
skills.description: Create, view, and track AI-generated meal plans. The agent generates plan content; the app stores and tracks compliance. Includes load_meal_plan, get_meal_plan, update_meal_compliance, and get_plan_progress.
examples: What am I supposed to eat today?

skills.name: Device Integration
skills.description: Configure connections to fitness devices and services (Strava, Polar, Garmin, Fitbit, WHOOP, Oura, Withings). Write-only credential storage — agent can set but never read credentials back.
examples: I want to set up my Garmin
